channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [OpenAI] markitdown
item.description:
📉 Rank: #6 → #7 (↓1)
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 117,546 | Forks: 7,711

item.title: [OpenAI] hermes-agent

item.title: [Claude] claude-code
item.description:
📉 Rank: #5 → #6 (↓1)
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
Language: Shell
Category: Claude Stars: 118,260 | Forks: 19,671

item.title: [Claude] gstack
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 83,439 → 84,481 (+1,042)
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 84,481 | Forks: 12,340

item.title: [Claude] andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 88,333 → 91,572 (+3,239)
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
Category: Claude Stars: 91,572 | Forks: 8,775
